textPlain: FAA details the marking and lighting requirements here: https://www.faa.gov/regulations_policies/advisory_circulars/...
Much like fireflies, the towers are attempting to attract the female of the species, the dirigible, to mate.
This blog post has a really verbose format.TLDR; White lights are used during the daytime, red lights at night (less annoying), towers under 200 feet don't need blinking lights.
